title: xanthophytum longipedunculatum
intro: Xanthophytum longipedunculatum, also known as Javanese baya or baya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Xanthophytum longipedunculatum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
